Careers

Join our fun education team!

Available Positions
Regular Supply Preschool Educator Position

We are currently seeking regular supply educator(s) and program assistants. Teachers, former child care providers, or ECE students/graduates are all welcome to apply.

Our educators demonstrate respect for diversity, equity, and inclusion while offering emergent curriculum-based learning experiences for optimal early development and learning. Educators should be enthusiastic, patient, passionate, caring, be a team player, and have lots of energy.

Interested candidates should submit their resumes to the Program Director at info@bccns.ca with subject line “Supply teacher application”.

Bells Corners Co-operative Nursery School

3955 Old Richmond Road
Nepean ON  K2H 5C5
